summary: Iteration 88: Backend tests for 4 new AI features - ALL 22 TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) POST /api/ai/explain-recommendation returns explanation and stores in procedure.ai_explanations.implant_0, (2) POST /api/ai/case-summary returns summary and stores in procedure.ai_case_summary, (3) POST /api/ai/surgical-notes returns notes and stores in procedure.ai_surgical_notes, (4) POST /api/ai/chat returns response+history and stores in procedure.ai_chat_history, (5) GET /api/ai/chat/{procedure_id} returns chat history, (6) All endpoints require auth (403 without token), (7) All endpoints return 404 for invalid procedure_id, (8) GET /api/procedures/{id} returns all AI fields.
critical_code_review_comments: AI endpoints correctly use emergentintegrations LlmChat with gpt-5.2 model
All AI outputs are properly stored in MongoDB procedure document
Chat history accumulates correctly with user+assistant message pairs
_build_case_context() helper provides comprehensive clinical context for AI prompts
Auth protection via Depends(get_current_user) on all AI endpoints
seed_data_creation: Used existing procedure 69cfde8b356c7405230a9dcc with implant plans for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 88 verified 4 new AI features using GPT-5.2 via Emergent Universal Key. All endpoints working: /api/ai/explain-recommendation, /api/ai/case-summary, /api/ai/surgical-notes, /api/ai/chat (POST+GET). AI responses are non-deterministic so tests verify non-empty responses and proper storage. Chat history accumulates per procedure.

feature_1_explain_recommendation.description: Explains implant selection rationale using clinical reasoning

feature_2_case_summary.description: Generates structured clinical case summary for PDF export

feature_3_surgical_notes.description: Generates surgical operative notes from drilling protocol data

feature_4_ai_chat.description: Implanr AI context-aware clinical assistant with conversation history
